headings.usage: Game Title, Massive Scores, Game Over Text

body.usage: HUD, Buttons, Leaderboard Text, Subtitles, Input Fields

effects.name: CRT Scanlines
effects.css: background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.15), rgba(0,0,0,0.15) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 2px); pointer-events: none; z-index: 50; position: fixed; inset: 0;

effects.name: Vignette
effects.css: box-shadow: inset 0 0 100px rgba(0,0,0,0.9); pointer-events: none; z-index: 40; position: fixed; inset: 0;

motion: Flicker on load (opacity 0 to 1 with quick random stops to mimic tube warm-up)
Continuous subtle text shadow pulsation for title and primary CTAs
Hard cuts, no soft easing (step-end transitions for authentic retro feel, except for glow hover states)

primary.style: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#00F0FF] text-[#00F0FF] uppercase tracking-[0.2em] px-8 py-4 font-['Azeret_Mono'] font-bold transition-all duration-200 shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(0,240,255,0.2)] inset-shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(0,240,255,0.2)]

secondary.style: bg-transparent border border-[#FF3366] text-[#FF3366] uppercase tracking-[0.2em] px-6 py-3 font-['Azeret_Mono'] text-sm transition-all duration-200

panels.style: bg-[#0C0C12]/95 border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-md p-8 shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,240,255,0.05)]

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b-2 border-white/20 text-white font-['Azeret_Mono'] text-2xl text-center uppercase tracking-widest focus:outline-none focus:border-[#00F0FF] focus:shadow-[0_4px_10px_rgba(0,240,255,0.3)] transition-all placeholder:text-white/20

main_menu.layout: Flex column, vertically and horizontally centered. Massive glowing title at the top, CTAs stacked below with generous padding.
elements: Title: 'GRAV-SHIFT' (font: Unbounded, text-6xl md:text-8xl, text-[#F4F4F5], Cyan drop-shadow glow)
Play Button (Primary Button style, testid: play-button)
Leaderboard Button (Secondary Button style, testid: leaderboard-button)
Controls Hint: 'TAP: FLAP | CATCH ORBS: FLIP GRAVITY' (font: Azeret Mono, text-xs, text-gray-500, tracking-[0.2em], mt-12)
Sound Toggle Icon (Top right, absolute position, testid: mute-toggle)

game_hud.layout: Absolute positioning layered completely over canvas. Needs to be distraction-free.
elements: Score: Top center. Massive but semi-transparent (font: Unbounded, text-6xl md:text-8xl, text-white/30, pointer-events-none)
Gravity Indicator: Top left. Glowing arrow pointing up/down. Pulsing animation (text-[#FFD600] or text-[#FF3366] depending on direction)
Pause Button: Top right minimal icon (testid: pause-button)

pause_overlay.layout: Full screen absolute overlay with deep dark overlay layer (`bg-[#050508]/90`). Content centered.
elements: Paused Text: (font: Unbounded, text-4xl, tracking-widest, text-white, mb-8)
Resume Button (Primary, testid: resume-button)
Quit to Menu Button (Secondary, testid: quit-button, mt-4)

game_over.layout: Centered floating panel (Panel style) inside a full screen dark overlay.
elements: Game Over Header: (font: Unbounded, text-5xl md:text-6xl, text-[#FF3366], text-shadow glow)
Final Score Value: Massive number (font: Unbounded, text-7xl, text-white)
New High Score Label: Flashing opacity (text-[#39FF14], uppercase, tracking-widest, text-sm) - Only shows if applicable
Name Entry Input: Max length 3 or 5, minimal bottom border (Input style, testid: player-name-input)
Submit Score Button: (Primary, testid: submit-score-button, w-full mt-6)
Retry Button: (Secondary, testid: retry-button)
Menu Button: (Minimal text link, testid: menu-button)

leaderboard.layout: Centered floating panel covering 80% max-w-2xl height. List format with strict grid rows.
elements: Header: 'TOP OPERATORS' (font: Unbounded, text-3xl, text-[#00F0FF], mb-8)
List rows: Grid 3 cols (Rank, Name, Score). Rank 1: Yellow glow. Rank 2: Cyan glow. Rank 3: Coral glow. Others: White/60.
Close/Back Button: Absolute top right or fixed at bottom (testid: close-leaderboard-button)

background_art.description: Pink and green grid/neon illustration. Use as subtle background blend layer behind the menu. Opacity should be around 10-15% to let the black void dominate.

cabinet_texture.description: Background neon retro pattern for subtle styling or fallback texture.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard DOM setup with React and Tailwind for the UI overlays. Game canvas runs independently behind these absolute/fixed UI layers.
Do NOT build generic Shadcn Card/Button components for the in-game screens. This breaks the arcade aesthetic. Use the raw Tailwind utility strings provided in `components` for custom styling.
To achieve the CRT effect, add a global div overlay with `pointer-events-none z-50 fixed inset-0` and apply the CRT Scanlines and Vignette CSS from the visual_enhancers.effects section.
FastAPI/Mongo backend needs a `POST /api/scores` and `GET /api/scores` endpoint for the global leaderboard functionality.
Implement audio contexts for the background music and simple sound effects (flap, flip, crash, game over). Connect mute_toggle state to audio contexts.
Ensure `data-testid` properties are applied exactly as specified for E2E testing.
